subject: [PATCH v6 09/20] nfsd: add data structures for handling CB_NOTIFY

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds data structures and callback operations to support directory delegation CB_NOTIFY in the NFS server (nfsd). It introduces two new structs: nfsd_notify_event, which carries fsnotify events for CB_NOTIFY, and nfsd4_cb_notify, which represents per-delegation state for notification handling. The patch also refactors alloc_init_deleg() into a common function with a pluggable sc_free callback and adds alloc_init_dir_deleg(), which allocates resources needed for CB_NOTIFY encoding. Additionally, it initializes the nfsd4_cb_notify_ops structure with done and release handlers that will be filled in when the notification path is implemented.
